column1: C[dendy7h: woo hoo you implemented chat
C[matburt: you are about to get burned
C[dendy7h: what the fuck just happend?
dendy7h: I don't like this game
C[matburt: hehe, sounds like you and I need to sit down and let me show you some of the complexities of this game
dendy7h: I was supposed to take that whole upper left hand corner, now I'm about to lose 2 pieces
C[matburt: you were close on that one
matburt: that's how close you were
C[dendy7h: your gay chat update made me lose valuable chat
C[matburt: man... we are up to almost 100 users and 60 ongoing games!
C[dendy7h: lets figure out a way to make money off this, I want to work on whatever I wanna work on and wakeboard most of the time
C[dendy7h: if we can figure out how to incorporate gambling and take 5% then bam
C[dendy7h: I see where you turned on notifications, that way I know when its my turn to whoop that ass
C[dendy7h: aren't we pretty much done?  there are a few ones of yours I can take and a few of mine you can take but most of them are uncapturable
C[matburt: This one looks done to me if you want to pass
C[dendy7h: I can still capture some of your stones and you can get some of mine
matburt: dude, the last part of the game is the stone removal phase where we agree on those things... just pass.
C[dendy7h: what kind of bullshit is this:
dendy7h: Spectator chats will be visible to players once the game has finished.
dendy7h: I wanna see what people are saying about me during the gmae
C[dendy7h: I'm about to get some points :)
C[matburt: you've done pretty well in this one dendy
matburt: I think it's about time I resigned
matburt: I think you are ready to join at least one of our tournaments
dendy7h: shit thats what happens when I move beofre thinking
C[dendy7h: thanks you too... why did I start out with 9 stones?
C[james.heiney: It automatically assigned the stones according to our stated ranks
